title: 151 TT503 Tape, Silver
features: VERSATILE, MULTI USE TAPE: 151 Adhesives Duct Tape, water resistant, permanenet adhesive, bonds to virtually any surface. Perfect for indoor or outdoor use.
TEMPORARY REPAIRS & QUICK FIXES: 151 Adhesives Duct Tape, bonds to a wide range of surfaces materials to hold and seal for a quick fix or temporary repair, essential DIY tape.
STRONG & DURABLE : 151 Adhesives Duct Tape, tough, durable, weather resistant. An all round tape for quick fixes and temporary repairs in the home, garden, or garage.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Duct tape. Size: 30mX48mmX0.17mm. Colour: Grey. Store at room temperature
